title: 「Each other / One another」句型
titleZh: 「Each other / One another」表達「互相／彼此」
titleEn: Using each other and one another for reciprocal actions

source.file: Sentence Structure 44 -「Each other _ One another」表達「互相／彼此」.pdf

formula: Plural subject + verb + each other / one another

formulas.formula: Plural subject + verb + each other / one another
Plural subject + verb + preposition + each other / one another
Plural subject + verb + each other’s / one another’s + noun

example: In strong teams, people challenge each other without trying to humiliate one another.
exampleZh: 在強大的團隊中，人們會互相挑戰，但不會彼此羞辱。

examples.en: In strong teams, people challenge each other without trying to humiliate one another.
examples.zh: 在強大的團隊中，人們會互相挑戰，但不會彼此羞辱。
examples.highlight: challenge each other without trying to humiliate one another

meaning.zh: Each other 和 one another 表示兩個或以上的人或事物彼此進行相同或相似的行為。

rules.en: Use these expressions for reciprocal actions.
rules.zh: Each other 和 one another 表達雙向或多向行為。
examples: Mia and Leo helped each other.

rules.en: Each other and one another are usually interchangeable.
rules.zh: 現代英語中 each other 與 one another 通常可以互換。

rules.en: Keep any preposition required by the verb.
rules.zh: 加入 each other 或 one another 時，必須保留動詞所需的介詞。

rules.en: Add ’s before a following noun in the possessive form.
rules.zh: 表示「對方的」或「彼此的」時，所有格要加 ’s。

rules.en: Each other is different from themselves.
rules.zh: Each other 表示彼此；themselves 表示各自幫助自己。

rules.en: These expressions do not normally serve as the sentence subject.
rules.zh: Each other 和 one another 通常不作句子的主語。

benefits.en: It clearly shows that the action is mutual.
benefits.zh: 它能清楚表達雙方或多方都有進行該行為。
它能把兩個方向重複說明的句子縮短。

benefits.en: It avoids repeating names and pronouns.
benefits.zh: 它可避免反覆重複人物名稱和代名詞。

benefits.en: It is useful for relationships, teamwork and communication.
benefits.zh: 它適合描述關係、合作和溝通。

benefits.en: Its possessive form expresses the other person’s things clearly.
benefits.zh: 所有格形式能簡潔表達「對方的東西」。

en: Rewrite each sentence using each other or one another. Use each other’s or one another’s where possession is required.
Preserve any necessary preposition and the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 each other 或 one another 改寫以下句子；需要表示所有關係時，使用 each other’s 或 one another’s。
保留必要的介詞和原句意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia helped Leo, and Leo helped Mia.
questions.promptZh: 米婭幫助里奧，而里奧也幫助米婭。
questions.answer: Mia and Leo helped each other.
questions.answerZh: 米婭和里奧互相幫助。
questions.highlight: Mia and Leo helped each other.

questions.prompt: Ben smiled at Ava, and Ava smiled at Ben.
questions.promptZh: 本向艾娃微笑，而艾娃也向本微笑。
questions.answer: Ben and Ava smiled at each other.
questions.answerZh: 本和艾娃互相微笑。
questions.highlight: Ben and Ava smiled at each other.

questions.prompt: Each twin hugged the other.
questions.promptZh: 雙胞胎中的每一人都擁抱對方。
questions.answer: The twins hugged each other.
questions.answerZh: 這對雙胞胎互相擁抱。
questions.highlight: The twins hugged each other.

questions.prompt: I listen to Sara, and Sara listens to me.
questions.promptZh: 我聆聽莎拉，而莎拉也聆聽我。
questions.answer: Sara and I listen to each other.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉和我互相聆聽。
questions.highlight: Sara and I listen to each other.

questions.prompt: The first dog chased the second dog, and the second chased the first.
questions.promptZh: 第一隻狗追逐第二隻狗，而第二隻狗也追逐第一隻狗。
questions.answer: The two dogs chased each other.
questions.answerZh: 兩隻狗互相追逐。
questions.highlight: The two dogs chased each other.

questions.prompt: We share notes with our classmates, and they share notes with us.
questions.promptZh: 我們與同學分享筆記，而他們也與我們分享筆記。
questions.answer: We all share notes with one another.
questions.answerZh: 我們大家互相分享筆記。
questions.highlight: We all share notes with one another.

questions.prompt: Anna thanked Ravi, and Ravi thanked Anna.
questions.promptZh: 安娜感謝拉維，而拉維也感謝安娜。
questions.answer: Anna and Ravi thanked each other.
questions.answerZh: 安娜和拉維互相感謝。
questions.highlight: Anna and Ravi thanked each other.

questions.prompt: Both teams respected the opposing team.
questions.promptZh: 兩支隊伍都尊重對方隊伍。
questions.answer: The two teams respected each other.
questions.answerZh: 兩支隊伍互相尊重。
questions.highlight: The two teams respected each other.

questions.prompt: Tom often tells Jay jokes, and Jay often tells Tom jokes.
questions.promptZh: 湯姆經常說笑話給傑伊聽，而傑伊也經常說笑話給湯姆聽。
questions.answer: Tom and Jay often tell each other jokes.
questions.answerZh: 湯姆和傑伊經常互相說笑話。
questions.highlight: Tom and Jay often tell each other jokes.

questions.prompt: I send messages to my sister, and she sends messages to me.
questions.promptZh: 我傳訊息給姐姐，而她也傳訊息給我。
questions.answer: My sister and I send messages to each other.
questions.answerZh: 我和姐姐互相傳訊息。
questions.highlight: My sister and I send messages to each other.

questions.prompt: Amy apologised to Daniel, and Daniel apologised to Amy.
questions.promptZh: 艾米向丹尼爾道歉，而丹尼爾也向艾米道歉。
questions.answer: Amy and Daniel apologised to each other.
questions.answerZh: 艾米和丹尼爾互相道歉。
questions.highlight: Amy and Daniel apologised to each other.

questions.prompt: Every player gave advice to the other players.
questions.promptZh: 每名球員都向其他球員提出建議。
questions.answer: The players gave one another advice.
questions.answerZh: 球員互相提出建議。
questions.highlight: The players gave one another advice.

questions.prompt: Each neighbour watched the other neighbour’s home during the holiday.
questions.promptZh: 每名鄰居都在假期期間看顧另一名鄰居的住所。
questions.answer: The neighbours watched each other’s homes during the holiday.
questions.answerZh: 鄰居在假期期間互相看顧住所。
questions.highlight: The neighbours watched each other’s homes during the holiday.

questions.prompt: Each of the two departments shares information with the other.
questions.promptZh: 兩個部門都會與對方分享資料。
questions.answer: The two departments share information with each other.
questions.answerZh: 兩個部門互相分享資料。
questions.highlight: The two departments share information with each other.

questions.prompt: The children formed a circle because they wanted to see the faces of the others.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們圍成一圈，因為他們想看到其他人的臉。
questions.answer: The children formed a circle to see one another’s faces.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們圍成一圈，以便看到彼此的臉。
questions.highlight: The children formed a circle to see one another’s faces.

questions.prompt: The manager introduced Alice to Ben and Ben to Alice.
questions.promptZh: 經理把愛麗絲介紹給本，也把本介紹給愛麗絲。
questions.answer: The manager introduced Alice and Ben to each other.
questions.answerZh: 經理把愛麗絲和本介紹給對方認識。
questions.highlight: The manager introduced Alice and Ben to each other.

questions.prompt: You should keep sending updates to your partner, and your partner should do the same for you.
questions.promptZh: 你應該繼續向拍檔提供最新消息，而你的拍檔也應該同樣向你提供最新消息。
questions.answer: You and your partner should keep sending updates to each other.
questions.answerZh: 你和拍檔應該繼續互相提供最新消息。
questions.highlight: You and your partner should keep sending updates to each other.

questions.prompt: Both clubs regularly invite members of the other club to events.
questions.promptZh: 兩個社團都經常邀請另一個社團的會員參加活動。
questions.answer: The two clubs regularly invite each other’s members to events.
questions.answerZh: 兩個社團經常邀請對方的會員參加活動。
questions.highlight: The two clubs regularly invite each other’s members to events.

questions.prompt: No child blamed any of the other children for the mistake.
questions.promptZh: 沒有孩子因這個錯誤而責怪其他孩子。
questions.answer: The children did not blame one another for the mistake.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們沒有因這個錯誤而互相責怪。
questions.highlight: The children did not blame one another for the mistake.

questions.prompt: Sophie kept looking at Maya’s drawings, and Maya kept looking at Sophie’s.
questions.promptZh: 蘇菲不停看瑪雅的畫，而瑪雅也不停看蘇菲的畫。
questions.answer: Sophie and Maya kept looking at each other’s drawings.
questions.answerZh: 蘇菲和瑪雅不停看對方的畫。
questions.highlight: Sophie and Maya kept looking at each other’s drawings.

questions.prompt: Every student compared the answers written by the other students.
questions.promptZh: 每名學生都比較其他學生所寫的答案。
questions.answer: The students compared one another’s answers.
questions.answerZh: 學生比較彼此的答案。
questions.highlight: The students compared one another’s answers.

questions.prompt: The two singers took turns supporting the other singer during practice.
questions.promptZh: 兩名歌手在練習期間輪流支持對方。
questions.answer: The two singers took turns supporting each other during practice.
questions.answerZh: 兩名歌手在練習期間輪流互相支持。
questions.highlight: The two singers took turns supporting each other during practice.

questions.prompt: When one worker was busy, the other workers helped that person.
questions.promptZh: 當一名員工忙碌時，其他員工便會幫助那人。
questions.answer: The workers helped one another whenever someone was busy.
questions.answerZh: 每當有人忙碌時，員工便會互相幫助。
questions.highlight: The workers helped one another whenever someone was busy.

questions.prompt: Every country agreed to respect the borders of the other countries.
questions.promptZh: 每個國家都同意尊重其他國家的邊界。
questions.answer: The countries agreed to respect one another’s borders.
questions.answerZh: 各國同意尊重彼此的邊界。
questions.highlight: The countries agreed to respect one another’s borders.

questions.prompt: Team members should warn the other members whenever they notice a problem.
questions.promptZh: 團隊成員發現問題時，應該提醒其他成員。
questions.answer: Team members should warn one another whenever they notice a problem.
questions.answerZh: 團隊成員發現問題時，應該互相提醒。
questions.highlight: Team members should warn one another whenever they notice a problem.

questions.prompt: Each brother sometimes borrowed clothes belonging to the other brother.
questions.promptZh: 兩兄弟有時會借用對方的衣服。
questions.answer: The brothers sometimes borrowed each other’s clothes.
questions.answerZh: 兩兄弟有時會借用對方的衣服。
questions.highlight: The brothers sometimes borrowed each other’s clothes.

questions.prompt: The participants made the discussion useful by listening to the others and responding to their ideas.
questions.promptZh: 參加者聆聽其他人的發言並回應他們的想法，使討論更有用。
questions.answer: The participants made the discussion useful by listening to one another and responding to one another’s ideas.
questions.answerZh: 參加者聆聽彼此的發言，並回應彼此的想法，使討論更有用。
questions.highlight: The participants made the discussion useful by listening to one another and responding to one another’s ideas.

questions.prompt: The first machine sends data to the second, and the second sends data back to the first.
questions.promptZh: 第一部機器把數據傳送給第二部，而第二部也把數據傳回第一部。
questions.answer: The two machines send data to each other.
questions.answerZh: 兩部機器互相傳送數據。
questions.highlight: The two machines send data to each other.

questions.prompt: The children were told that no one should laugh at anyone else.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們被告知，任何人都不應嘲笑其他人。
questions.answer: The children were told not to laugh at one another.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們被告知不要互相嘲笑。
questions.highlight: The children were told not to laugh at one another.

questions.prompt: The residents take turns checking the doors belonging to the other residents.
questions.promptZh: 居民輪流檢查其他居民的家門。
questions.answer: The residents take turns checking one another’s doors.
questions.answerZh: 居民輪流檢查彼此的家門。
questions.highlight: The residents take turns checking one another’s doors.

questions.prompt: Neither friend had spoken to the other for several weeks.
questions.promptZh: 兩名朋友已有數星期沒有跟對方說話。
questions.answer: The two friends had not spoken to each other for several weeks.
questions.answerZh: 兩名朋友已有數星期沒有互相交談。
questions.highlight: The two friends had not spoken to each other for several weeks.

questions.prompt: During the game, every player had to trust the other players.
questions.promptZh: 比賽期間，每名球員都必須信任其他球員。
questions.answer: During the game, the players had to trust one another.
questions.answerZh: 比賽期間，球員必須互相信任。
questions.highlight: During the game, the players had to trust one another.

questions.prompt: The companies are competitors, but each company still learns from the other.
questions.promptZh: 兩間公司是競爭對手，但每間公司仍會向對方學習。
questions.answer: Although the companies are competitors, they still learn from each other.
questions.answerZh: 雖然兩間公司是競爭對手，但它們仍會互相學習。
questions.highlight: Although the companies are competitors, they still learn from each other.

questions.prompt: The children formed pairs, and each child checked the work of the partner.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們組成二人小組，而每名孩子都檢查拍檔的作品。
questions.answer: After forming pairs, the children checked each other’s work.
questions.answerZh: 組成二人小組後，孩子們互相檢查作品。
questions.highlight: After forming pairs, the children checked each other’s work.

questions.prompt: One witness’s description did not match the other witness’s description.
questions.promptZh: 一名證人的描述與另一名證人的描述並不相符。
questions.answer: The witnesses’ descriptions did not match each other.
questions.answerZh: 兩名證人的描述彼此並不相符。
questions.highlight: The witnesses’ descriptions did not match each other.

questions.prompt: The coach asked every player to encourage the other players rather than criticise them.
questions.promptZh: 教練要求每名球員鼓勵其他球員，而不是批評他們。
questions.answer: The coach asked the players to encourage each other rather than criticise one another.
questions.answerZh: 教練要求球員互相鼓勵，而不是彼此批評。
questions.highlight: The coach asked the players to encourage each other rather than criticise one another.

questions.prompt: The first side kept blaming the second, and the second kept blaming the first, so the argument continued.
questions.promptZh: 第一方不斷責怪第二方，而第二方也不斷責怪第一方，因此爭論持續。
questions.answer: The two sides kept blaming each other, so the argument continued.
questions.answerZh: 雙方不斷互相責怪，因此爭論持續。
questions.highlight: The two sides kept blaming each other, so the argument continued.

questions.prompt: If the departments do not share their plans with the other departments, the project may be delayed.
questions.promptZh: 如果各部門不與其他部門分享計劃，項目可能會延誤。
questions.answer: If the departments do not share their plans with one another, the project may be delayed.
questions.answerZh: 如果各部門不互相分享計劃，項目可能會延誤。
questions.highlight: If the departments do not share their plans with one another, the project may be delayed.

questions.prompt: The teacher arranged the desks so that every student could see the faces of the other students.
questions.promptZh: 老師安排書桌的位置，讓每名學生都能看到其他學生的臉。
questions.answer: The teacher arranged the desks so that the students could see one another’s faces.
questions.answerZh: 老師安排書桌的位置，讓學生能看到彼此的臉。
questions.highlight: The teacher arranged the desks so that the students could see one another’s faces.

questions.prompt: In each pair, one volunteer checked the other volunteer’s contact details, and the other did the same.
questions.promptZh: 在每一組中，一名義工檢查另一名義工的聯絡資料，而對方也做同樣的事。
questions.answer: In each pair, the volunteers checked each other’s contact details.
questions.answerZh: 在每一組中，義工互相檢查聯絡資料。
questions.highlight: In each pair, the volunteers checked each other’s contact details.

questions.prompt: Although the scientists disagreed, every scientist carefully considered the arguments made by the others.
questions.promptZh: 雖然科學家意見不一，但每名科學家都仔細考慮其他人提出的論點。
questions.answer: Although the scientists disagreed, they carefully considered one another’s arguments.
questions.answerZh: 雖然科學家意見不一，但他們仍仔細考慮彼此的論點。
questions.highlight: Although the scientists disagreed, they carefully considered one another’s arguments.

questions.prompt: Each hospital refers patients to the other hospital when a specialist service is unavailable.
questions.promptZh: 當某項專科服務無法提供時，每間醫院都會把病人轉介到另一間醫院。
questions.answer: The two hospitals refer patients to each other when a specialist service is unavailable.
questions.answerZh: 當某項專科服務無法提供時，兩間醫院會互相轉介病人。
questions.highlight: The two hospitals refer patients to each other when a specialist service is unavailable.

questions.prompt: The debate rules allow both speakers to challenge the other speaker, but neither may interrupt.
questions.promptZh: 辯論規則容許兩名講者質疑對方，但任何一方都不可打斷對方。
questions.answer: The debate rules allow the speakers to challenge each other without interrupting one another.
questions.answerZh: 辯論規則容許講者互相質疑，但不可彼此打斷。
questions.highlight: The debate rules allow the speakers to challenge each other without interrupting one another.

questions.prompt: Because the members had worked together for years, each could often understand the others without a long explanation.
questions.promptZh: 由於成員已共事多年，每個人往往不需要長篇解釋也能明白其他人的意思。
questions.answer: Because the members had worked together for years, they could often understand one another without a long explanation.
questions.answerZh: 由於成員已共事多年，他們往往不需要長篇解釋也能明白彼此的意思。
questions.highlight: Because the members had worked together for years, they could often understand one another without a long explanation.

questions.prompt: The countries regularly review the trade rules of the others and adjust their own rules in response.
questions.promptZh: 各國定期檢視其他國家的貿易規則，並相應調整本身的規則。
questions.answer: The countries regularly review one another’s trade rules and adjust their own rules in response.
questions.answerZh: 各國定期檢視彼此的貿易規則，並相應調整本身的規則。
questions.highlight: The countries regularly review one another’s trade rules and adjust their own rules in response.

questions.prompt: The project succeeded because the engineers trusted the designers and the designers trusted the engineers.
questions.promptZh: 項目得以成功，因為工程師信任設計師，而設計師也信任工程師。
questions.answer: The project succeeded because the engineers and designers trusted each other.
questions.answerZh: 項目得以成功，因為工程師和設計師互相信任。
questions.highlight: The project succeeded because the engineers and designers trusted each other.

questions.prompt: No team should try to improve its results by hiding information from the other teams.
questions.promptZh: 任何團隊都不應透過向其他團隊隱瞞資料來改善成績。
questions.answer: Teams should not try to improve their results by hiding information from one another.
questions.answerZh: 團隊不應透過互相隱瞞資料來改善成績。
questions.highlight: Teams should not try to improve their results by hiding information from one another.

questions.prompt: The two communities had different traditions, but both made an effort to learn about the traditions of the other community.
questions.promptZh: 兩個社區有不同傳統，但雙方都努力了解另一個社區的傳統。
questions.answer: Although the communities had different traditions, they made an effort to learn about each other’s traditions.
questions.answerZh: 雖然兩個社區有不同傳統，但它們都努力了解彼此的傳統。
questions.highlight: Although the communities had different traditions, they made an effort to learn about each other’s traditions.

questions.prompt: During the emergency, every department sent staff and equipment to the others when they needed support.
questions.promptZh: 在緊急情況期間，每個部門都在其他部門需要支援時派出人手和設備。
questions.answer: During the emergency, the departments supported one another by sharing staff and equipment.
questions.answerZh: 在緊急情況期間，各部門透過共享人手和設備互相支援。
questions.highlight: During the emergency, the departments supported one another by sharing staff and equipment.

questions.prompt: In strong teams, people challenge their colleagues, and their colleagues challenge them too. However, no one tries to humiliate anyone else.
questions.promptZh: 在強大的團隊中，人們會挑戰同事，而同事也會挑戰他們。然而，沒有人會試圖羞辱其他人。
questions.answer: In strong teams, people challenge each other without trying to humiliate one another.
questions.answerZh: 在強大的團隊中，人們會互相挑戰，但不會彼此羞辱。
questions.highlight: In strong teams, people challenge each other without trying to humiliate one another.
